calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Unopposed Motion To Dismiss Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROBERT WILSON Unopposed Motion To Dismiss Action.

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Dismiss Action is granted as follows: 1) as to Plaintiff's individual PAGA claims, the dismissal shall be with prejudice; 2) as to Plaintiff's non-individual PAGA claims, the dismissal shall be without prejudice. Plaintiff shall submit a form of order.

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)
